name: ai-behavioral-runtime
description: Model-agnostic specification and runtime for predictable AI behavior.

scripts.test: npm run test:phase3 && npm run test:phase4 && npm run test:phase5 && npm run test:phase6 && npm run test:phase10
scripts.test:phase3: npm run typecheck && npm run build && node dist/tests/phase3-categories.test.js
scripts.test:phase4: npm run typecheck && npm run build && node dist/tests/phase4-constraint-registry.test.js
scripts.test:phase5: npm run typecheck && npm run build && node dist/tests/phase5-host-native-boundary.test.js
scripts.test:phase6: npm run typecheck && npm run build && node dist/tests/phase6-reasoning-strategies.test.js
scripts.test:phase10: npm run typecheck && npm run build && node dist/tests/phase10-evaluation.test.js
